name: Stables
description: Stablecoin-native infrastructure for accepting payments and sending fiat payouts across 100+ countries.

seo.title: Stables — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Stables: Stablecoin-native infrastructure for accepting payments and sending fiat payouts across 100+ countries.

when_to_use: Stablecoin payment acceptance with fiat payout settlement
Cross-border payouts to 100+ countries in stablecoins
Eliminating FX fees with USDC/USDT payment infrastructure

pros: Useful for crypto-native payroll and B2B
cons: Regulatory status varies by destination country
Liquidity for local fiat off-ramp is uneven
Smaller track record than fiat-first peers
review.verdict: Fast growing stablecoin rails for global payouts — compelling where fiat correspondent banking fails.
review.best_for: Crypto-native teams needing cross-border payouts in stablecoins plus fiat off-ramp
review.not_for: Businesses requiring pure fiat processing with traditional reconciliation
